item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stays direct, explicitly says it will list tradeoffs and not choose, and then structures the budget/reputation costs across the three options. It does not fire triage, does not impose a brake verdict, and leaves the decision owner with the user."}
